pre_game.message: Hey D, I'm J and I heard about this Simco game—sounds like a fun way to win some cash. What's your take on it?
Hey J, nice to meet you! I'm pretty stoked about this Simco game too—it's a real chance to win some cash and help out the people I care about. What's got you interested in it?
Oh, same here, D—I'm all in because I need to win some cash to support my family and friends; it just feels like a great opportunity to make that happen! What about you, any strategies in mind?
Oh, totally, J—I'm in it to help my loved ones too; for strategies, I'm just planning to play fair but smart, maybe build some alliances early. How about you, got any ideas brewing?
Yeah, D, I'm leaning towards building alliances like you said and staying observant—maybe watch how others play early on; what kind of alliances are you thinking about?

Oh, for sure, J—I'm picturing alliances with people who are straight-up and share the same vibe, like teaming up to share info and back each other without double-crossing; how do you see us starting one?
Oh, yeah, D, I think we could start simple—maybe just agree to share any tips we pick up early and check in with each other before making big moves, to build trust first.
Yeah, that sounds solid, J—I'm totally on board with sharing tips and checking in first to build that trust; let's keep an eye out for any early game hints and circle back soon!
Sounds great, D—let's keep our eyes peeled for those hints and catch up soon to make this work!
Yeah, absolutely, J—let's stay sharp and chat soon to make this alliance count!
Yeah, absolutely, D—I'm pumped for this alliance, let's make it count and win big!
